description: Deterministic output blocker for Vibe Engine red-line claims.

deception_or_truth.safe_replacement: This text can be described only by observable wording changes.

emotion_or_mind_reading.safe_replacement: No conclusion about internal state can be made from this text.

intent_or_outcome.safe_replacement: This text supports only a communication-pattern observation.

diagnosis_or_health.safe_replacement: Do not infer health, disability, or diagnosis from this text.

protected_trait_inference.safe_replacement: Do not infer protected traits from this text.

workplace_education.safe_replacement: Vibe Engine is not for workplace, hiring, or education decisions.

biometric_or_media.safe_replacement: Do not infer identity, emotion, or health from face, voice, or body media.

surveillance_or_covert_collection.safe_replacement: Use only data you own or have consent to review.

manipulation.safe_replacement: Use clear, consent-respecting language instead of pressure tactics.

major_life_decision.safe_replacement: Vibe Engine should not make or automate major life decisions.

provider_privacy_violation.safe_replacement: Keep raw personal data local unless the user explicitly chooses a provider flow.
